home.subtitle: Stop carrying paper medical records. Store your vitals securely and give first responders instant access through a beautiful digital or physical QR code.

features.d1: Data encrypted with bank-level encryption. You control who sees what.
features.d2: Flash-fast loading in emergency contexts. Time saves lives.
features.d3: Works globally. Multilingual pages for international responders.

how_it_works.title: How it works?
how_it_works.step1_d: Register and fill out your vital medical information online securely.
how_it_works.step2_d: Order your card. A unique QR code will be assigned and shipped to you.
how_it_works.step3_d: If anything happens, first responders scan your card to get quick access to your vitals.

pricing.title: Choose your protection
pricing.premium_d: Complete records, files & full coverage for 3 years.

home.footer: © 2026 LifeTag Medical Systems. Fast, secure, vital.

about.title: What is LifeTag?
about.content: LifeTag is an innovative medical identification system. In the event of an accident or medical emergency, first responders can scan your physical support (card, bracelet, or keychain) to get instant access to your encrypted vital data.

products.title: Choose your LifeTag
products.card_d: Easy to carry in your wallet
products.keychain_d: Practical and always on your keys
products.subtitle: Protect yourself with style and efficiency

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions about LifeTag, partnerships, or support? Send us a message.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject (optional)
contact.success: Message sent. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Data privacy
privacy.text: Your health information is processed with access control, validation, and audit logging safeguards. You can review our privacy commitments at any time.

audience.title: Who is LifeTag for?
items: People with chronic diseases (Diabetes, Asthma, Epilepsy, etc.)
Seniors living alone or with specific needs
Sports enthusiasts (Mountain biking, Hiking, Bikers) for isolated accidents
Children to ensure their safety during school trips
Anyone who cares about their health

dashboard.title: Your LifeTag Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your profile & order your card
dashboard.first_time: Welcome! Please fill in your emergency medical profile.
dashboard.vitals_free_banner: Free plan: shorter limits for allergies, diseases, and treatments. Additional notes and detailed disease history on scan are Premium-only. The emergency scan does not show birth date, weight, or height.
dashboard.vitals_premium_identity: Identity: birth date, weight, and height appear on the emergency page after the QR scan.
dashboard.vitals_free_identity: These fields are saved on your account but are not shown on the public emergency page on the Free plan (upgrade to Premium to show them to responders).
dashboard.vitals_maladies_too_long: The diseases block exceeds your plan limit ({{max}} characters). Shorten the “other” text or uncheck items.
dashboard.vitals_free_limits_short: Free limits: allergies {{a}}, diseases {{m}}, treatments {{med}} characters max. Premium: additional notes and extended dossier.

emergency.title: Emergency Medical Profile
emergency.age_auto_hint: Calculated automatically from your date of birth.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
sections.body: LifeTag collects only the data needed to run the service: account information, medical information you choose to enter, and minimal technical data for security and maintenance.

sections.heading: 2. Purpose of processing
sections.body: Data is used to provide emergency medical profiles, manage user accounts, secure access, and improve service quality.

sections.heading: 3. Confidentiality and security
sections.body: Access is protected by authentication. Sensitive operations (login, profile updates, medical data) are subject to application controls. We apply validation, rate limiting, and role-based access where appropriate.

sections.heading: 4. Data retention
sections.body: Data is kept while your account is active or as required by applicable law. You may request deletion of your data via support.

sections.heading: 5. Sharing of data
sections.body: We do not sell personal data. Data is only shared with technical processors strictly necessary for hosting, database, and payments, with appropriate safeguards.

sections.heading: 6. Your rights
sections.body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data. Contact: support@getlifetag.com

footer.tagline: Emergency medical ID: one scan to inform first responders.
